title: Elaginn gang
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Elaginn gang''' was a group of [[spice-jacker]]s and [[Slavery/Legends|slavers]] operating in [[Hutt Space/Legends|Hutt Space]] around [[10 ABY/Legends|10 ABY]]. Originally under [[Elaginn]], the group came under the control of [[Romort Raort]] after Raort killed Elaginn. The gang would disable their targets with an [[Ion cannon/Legends|ion cannon]] they stole from a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] ship, then board and capture the cargo and crew, the latter of which they would sell into slavery.

Under Raort, the gang built up influence with dockmasters on dozens of worlds, and was looking to expand its operations beyond Hutt Space.

==Sources==
*<!-- 1993-06-XX -->''[[Dark Empire Sourcebook]]''
